content.en:
After entering the convergence period, the Void Whale Overlord did not panic, he still had full confidence in himself.

And the giant boat of the Hurricane Pavilion also stopped, and many great ancestors came out of the giant boat one by one and entered the bottom of the empty galaxy river.

At this time, those creatures under the command of the Void Whale Overlord also killed them and surrounded these Great Ancestors one by one.

The fight has begun!

Rumble!!!!

In an instant, it became a battlefield.

The Hurricane Pavilion has an advantage in high-level immeasurable lifeforms and middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, while the Void Whale Overlord's side has a certain geographical advantage, but the geographical advantage is not big now.

Of course.

There are also many primary-level immeasurable lifeforms and countless creatures below the primary-level immeasurable lifeforms under the command of the Void Whale Overlord, which can also play a certain role.

At first, the Void Whale Overlord didn't make a move, but seeing that his men were suffering heavy casualties, he stopped watching the show.

Airplanes!!!!

The huge body of the Void Whale Overlord appeared on the battlefield, making many Great Ancestors tremble, this strength was indeed too terrifying, enough to instantly wipe out a large number of mid-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"Void Whale Overlord, you have finally appeared!"

The Pavilion Master of the Hurricane Pavilion, the Hurricane Great Ancestor, also took action, joining forces with two other high-level immeasurable lifeforms to besiege the Void Whale Overlord.

Just as they were fighting, a golden light shield enveloped the Void Whale Overlord and the Hurricane Great Ancestor, directly dividing the battlefield.

"It's ......"

The Void Whale Overlord looked at the light shield around him and suddenly understood something.

Its massive body slammed into the mask, but it didn't shake it.

"Void Whale Overlord, don't crash, it's useless, if the intersection period is over and your territory returns to the Voidless Galaxy, with your strength and the suppression of the Voidless Galaxy, there is still hope to break this light mask, but there is no hope now. Unless you can kill me, this mask will lose its energy, and you will break it!"

Hurricane Ancestor said.

This mask was bought by him at a certain price from a more powerful power, for today's invasion.

Sacrificing such a treasure, if it is to obtain the sea tower gold of the Void Whale Overlord, it will be worth it.

"Then I'll kill you!"

The Void Whale Overlord said angrily.

Thundered!!!!

The Void Whale Overlord and the Hurricane Ancestor are fighting, and in terms of strength, the Hurricane Ancestor is naturally inferior to the Void Whale Overlord, or a lot worse.

However, in a short period of time, the Void Whale Overlord couldn't kill the Hurricane Great Ancestor.

And without the Void Whale Overlord, those creatures under his command couldn't stop those mid-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Hurricane Pavilion at all.

At the same time, the other high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Hurricane Pavilion had entered the Void Whale Mountain, and almost all of the good things of the Void Whale Overlord were placed here, including the Hailou Gold Vein, which was also here.

Capturing the Sea Tower Gold is the goal of the Hurricane Pavilion, and everything else is incidental behavior.

However, just when these Great Ancestors of the Hurricane Pavilion arrived at the Void Whale Mountain, another Void Whale appeared, and the terrifying aura made these Great Ancestors look terrified.

"Another Void Whale Overlord? No, the strength is a little weaker, but it is also comparable to a high-level immeasurable lifeform! This is the heir of the Void Whale Overlord!!"

The Hurricane Pavilion was stunned, they didn't expect this situation at all.

This is not to blame them, after all, it is very difficult for their Hurricane Leader to find out the information of the Voidless Galaxy.

They had a general understanding of the strength of the Void Whale Mountain, but they didn't find out that the Void Whale Mountain also hid another Void Whale that had been sleeping for many years.

Although the strength of this Void Whale is not as good as that of the Void Whale Overlord, it is also much more powerful than the average high-level immeasurable lifeform, and in addition, it is here, so the advantage is even greater.

In order to deal with the Void Whale Overlord, the three most powerful high-level immeasurable lifeforms all joined forces to trap the Void Whale Overlord, and the remaining high-level immeasurable lifeforms were not too powerful.

"Come on with more Great Ancestors, deal with this Void Whale!"

A high-level immeasurable lifeform commanded.

Rumble!!!

Eight high-level immeasurable lifeforms shot together to deal with this void whale, and even then, it was barely a tie.

At this time, a group of Great Ancestors of the Hurricane Pavilion had already begun to search for Hailou Gold in the Void Whale Mountain, and began to enter the Hailou Gold Vein to mine the mining veins.

It's just that with those creatures blocking it, the mining process is naturally very difficult.

For the Hurricane Pavilion, it is best to find the treasure trove where the sea tower gold is stored.

Like those overlords of the Voidless Galaxy, they never put treasures on their bodies, they all put them in the treasure house of the old nest, which is a habit.

What no one knew was that Ye Tian had mixed into the Void Whale Mountain and was also looking for a treasure trove.

It's just that the Void Whale's side regards Ye Tian as its own, because Ye Tian's replica body is a creature of the Voidless Galaxy, and it does not belong to those Great Ancestors of the Hurricane Territory.

And those Great Ancestors of the Hurricane Leader naturally attacked when they saw Ye Tian, but Ye Tian didn't make a move with them, and ran away directly.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to sense that the time and space battle somewhere in the Void Whale Mountain was extremely fierce, and he expected that the treasure house was very likely to be there, so he passed over as soon as possible.

Sure enough.

When Ye Tian arrived there, a group of Great Ancestors were fighting with a group of elites from Void Whale Mountain.

This group of Void Whale Mountain elites is a clan of deep-water giant apes, each wearing weapons refined with Hailou gold, and each of them is comparable to the top middle-level immeasurable lifeforms that have been reforged six or seven times, and there are so many of them that together they are comparable to one or two high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

However, three high-level immeasurable lifeforms had already arrived on the side of the Hurricane Tower, and it was only a matter of time before they defeated this group of deep-water giant apes.

When Ye Tian came here, he was directly targeted by several Great Ancestors, and they immediately attacked.

Ye Tian didn't bother to pay attention to this group of Great Ancestors, his target was directly aimed at the entrance of the treasure house not far away.

"It should be this treasure house, and after they break this treasure house, I will take the opportunity to go in and grab it. Although there are three high-level immeasurable lifeforms, these three high-level immeasurable lifeforms are involved, but they don't have time to snatch them, so I have a great chance!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he fought against several great ancestors who besieged him, and he didn't expose his strength at all.

Although his replica body is a creature that has copied the voidless galaxy, it has also spent time reforging its life, and although its strength is not as good as that of other replica bodies, it also has battles comparable to ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and it is more suitable for the environment here.

Soon.

The entrance to the treasure house was breached by the Great Ancestors, and at this time he rushed directly over.

However, the three high-level immeasurable lifeforms were intercepted by the deep-water giant apes, which was naturally a little slower.
